intro: Aniselytron clemensiae, commonly known as Clemens' Aniselytron, is a type of grass found in the Philippines, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and diseases. The bioactive constituents of Aniselytron clemensiae include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
